name: Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation
summary: Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation engages in the promotion of art and cultural activities in Taiwan and internationally. It provides services in the areas of music, dance, exhibition, concert, drama, physical education, parenting, lecture, film, commodity, and package goods. The company was formerly known as Yucai International Marketing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation in July 2014. Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation was founded in 2004 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
